series_metadata.series_description: Plan submitted by a facility showing monitoring schedules and findings. The plan, effective for 20 years, monitors for escaping gases, such as methane from landfills.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1 year in operating area and 20 years in storage at State Record Center. If after 20 years, the facility feels the landfill is free from escaping gases, the EPA is asked to remove the plan. The EPA monitors for any escaping gas and if none is found, the plan is re- moved. The documents can then be destroyed., Paper: Recycle
